dsl_rule.translation_notes: MACD crossover strategy using allowed indicators macd and macd_signal. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT: LONG entries on upward crosses, SHORT entries on downward crosses. Exit conditions are reversal crosses of opposite direction. Target regimes set to TRENDING variants as specified in signal.

backtest_rule.reason: MACD crossover strategy using allowed indicators macd and macd_signal. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT: LONG entries on upward crosses, SHORT entries on downward crosses. Exit conditions are reversal crosses of opposite direction. Target regimes set to TRENDING variants as specified in signal.

source_rule_text: Buy when the MACD line crosses upwards through the signal line; sell when the MACD line crosses from above to below the signal line.
